history.en: The Toyger has a sweet, calm personality and is generally friendly. He's outgoing enough to walk on a leash, energetic enough to play fetch and other interactive games, and confident enough to get along with other cats and friendly dogs.
history.zh: 玩具虎猫性格甜美、冷静，通常很友好。它们足够外向，可以牵着散步；精力充沛，可以玩捡球和其他互动游戏；自信十足，能与其他猫和友好的狗相处。

overview.en: The Toyger is a striking domestic cat breed developed to resemble a miniature tiger, yet it possesses a sweet, calm, and friendly personality. Bred in the United States, this medium-to-large cat is playful, social, and highly intelligent. Toygers are outgoing enough to enjoy walking on a leash and energetic enough to engage in fetch and other interactive games. They are confident and adaptable, getting along well with other cats and friendly dogs. Their short, plush coat features bold, vertical stripes on a golden background, giving them a wild appearance that belies their gentle, people-oriented nature. Toygers thrive on human companionship and enjoy being part of family activities, making them excellent pets for households seeking an affectionate, lively, and trainable feline friend.
overview.zh: 玩具虎猫是一种引人注目的家猫品种，被培育成迷你老虎的模样，却拥有甜美、冷静且友善的性格。这种源自美国的中大型猫好玩、社交且非常聪明。玩具虎猫性格外向，能适应牵绳散步，精力充沛，喜欢玩接物和其他互动游戏。它们自信且适应性强，能与其他猫和友善的狗和睦相处。它们短而浓密的被毛在金色底色上带有醒目的垂直条纹，呈现出野性外观，但实则性情温和、亲近人类。玩具虎猫渴望人类陪伴，乐于参与家庭活动，是寻找深情、活泼且可训练猫伴侣家庭的绝佳选择。

care.en: Daily care for a Toyger is straightforward. Their short, dense coat requires minimal grooming—a weekly brushing with a soft bristle brush or rubber mitt to remove loose hair and keep the coat glossy. Baths are rarely needed. Toygers are energetic and need at least 20-30 minutes of active play daily, including interactive toys, puzzle feeders, and fetch. They benefit from leash training for safe outdoor exploration. Regular veterinary check-ups (annual wellness exams, vaccinations, and dental care) are essential. Trim nails every 2-3 weeks and clean ears as needed. Provide a sturdy scratching post to satisfy their natural scratching instinct. Because Toygers are social, avoid leaving them alone for long periods; consider a cat companion or pet sitter if you work long hours.
care.zh: 玩具虎猫的日常护理很简单。它们短而密的被毛只需极少的梳理——每周用软毛刷或橡胶手套梳理一次，去除死毛并保持毛发光泽。很少需要洗澡。玩具虎猫精力旺盛，每天需要至少20-30分钟的活跃游戏，包括互动玩具、益智喂食器和接物游戏。它们适合进行牵绳训练，以便安全地进行户外探索。定期兽医检查（年度健康体检、疫苗接种和牙齿护理）至关重要。每2-3周修剪一次指甲，并根据需要清洁耳朵。提供一个结实的抓柱来满足它们的自然抓挠本能。由于玩具虎猫善于社交，避免长时间独处；如果您工作时间长，考虑为它找个猫同伴或宠物保姆。

training.en: Toygers are highly intelligent and trainable, responding well to positive reinforcement methods such as clicker training, treats, and praise. They can learn a variety of tricks, including sit, high-five, and fetch. Leash training is often successful due to their outgoing nature; start indoors with a harness before moving outdoors. Use short, engaging sessions (5-10 minutes) to maintain their interest. Toygers also excel at puzzle toys and can be taught to use a cat flap or perform simple commands. Consistency and patience are key. Avoid punishment, as it can damage trust. Because they are social, incorporate training into playtime to keep it fun. Early socialization with people, other cats, and friendly dogs helps ensure a well-adjusted adult cat.
training.zh: 玩具虎猫非常聪明且易于训练，对积极强化方法反应良好，如响片训练、零食和表扬。它们能学习各种技巧，包括坐下、击掌和接物。由于其外向性格，牵绳训练通常很成功；先在室内用胸背带练习，再转到户外。使用短而有趣的训练时段（5-10分钟）来保持它们的兴趣。玩具虎猫还擅长益智玩具，并能学会使用猫门或执行简单指令。一致性和耐心是关键。避免惩罚，因为这会破坏信任。由于它们善于社交，将训练融入游戏时间以保持乐趣。早期与人类、其他猫和友善的狗进行社交，有助于确保成年后适应良好的猫。

diet.en: Feed your Toyger a high-quality, balanced diet appropriate for their life stage (kitten, adult, senior). Look for commercial cat foods with real meat (chicken, turkey, or fish) as the first ingredient, with moderate protein and fat levels. Toygers are active and may need slightly more calories than less energetic breeds, but avoid overfeeding to prevent obesity. Divide daily food into 2-3 measured meals rather than free-feeding. Fresh, clean water should always be available. Consider incorporating wet food to increase moisture intake and support urinary tract health. Treats should be limited to no more than 10% of daily calories. Consult your veterinarian for specific dietary recommendations, especially if your cat has health issues or allergies.
diet.zh: 为您的玩具虎猫提供适合其生命阶段（幼猫、成猫、老年猫）的高品质、均衡饮食。选择以真实肉类（鸡肉、火鸡或鱼肉）为首要成分的商品猫粮，并含有适中的蛋白质和脂肪。玩具虎猫活跃，可能比不太活跃的品种需要略多的热量，但要避免过度喂食以防肥胖。将每日食物分为2-3次定量餐，而不是自由采食。应始终提供新鲜干净的水。考虑加入湿粮以增加水分摄入，支持泌尿道健康。零食应限制在每日热量的10%以内。咨询您的兽医以获得具体饮食建议，特别是如果您的猫有健康问题或过敏。

livingTips.en: Toygers adapt well to various living environments, including apartments and houses, provided they have enough space to play and explore. They are not strictly indoor cats but should be kept indoors or in a secure catio/leashed walks for safety. Due to their high energy, provide vertical spaces (cat trees, shelves), interactive toys, and a window perch for bird-watching. They get along excellently with children who respect their boundaries and with other cats and cat-friendly dogs, making them ideal for multi-pet households. Toygers are social and may suffer from separation anxiety if left alone too long; consider a companion pet or interactive feeders. A home with moderate activity levels suits them best, as they enjoy being part of daily life without being overly demanding.
livingTips.zh: 玩具虎猫能很好地适应各种生活环境，包括公寓和房屋，只要它们有足够的空间玩耍和探索。它们并非严格意义上的室内猫，但为了安全，应养在室内或配备安全的猫笼/牵绳散步。由于精力充沛，请提供垂直空间（猫树、搁板）、互动玩具和观鸟窗台。它们能与尊重其界限的孩子以及其他猫和友善的狗相处融洽，因此是多宠物家庭的理想选择。玩具虎猫善于社交，如果长时间独处可能会产生分离焦虑；考虑养一个同伴宠物或使用互动喂食器。中等活动水平的家庭最适合它们，因为它们喜欢参与日常生活，而不过分苛求。
